description:
We're the happy place for animal lovers!  You’ll always find real pets, real joy and real moments that remind you why animals make life better, here at The Pet Collective.  

✨💕🐶Subscribe to The Scoop for our most entertaining pet videos, helpful pet parenting tips, and exclusive deals delivered straight to your email: https://bit.ly/TPCNewsLetter 😹❤️✨

Has your pet taken over your Instagram feed? Submit your best pet videos for a chance to be featured on TPC:

title: These Pets are total Goobers 🤦 | The FUNNIEST Pet Videos Of The Week
